case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. TREND GARMENT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT TREND GARMENT COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREND GARMENT COMPANY $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.16 INTEREST, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $374.16, TOTAL $374.16
